description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded yellow body with two long, pointed ears tipped in black, large round black eyes with white highlights, and rosy red cheeks. Its mouth is small and curved into a gentle smile, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The arms are short and slightly extended forward, while the legs are stubby and positioned close together. On the back, there are two brown horizontal stripes and a prominent, jagged lightning bolt-shaped tail colored yellow with a brown base. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall build suggests it is lightweight and squeezable.
description: A soft, plush Pikachu stuffed toy with yellow fur, black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail. It has a friendly smile and a cuddly, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, black eyes, and both arms extended forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, one ear, and the full zigzag shape of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two brown stripes on the back and the base of the lightning bolt tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, with the tail and ear visible, and the cheek spot on this side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large round eyes, a small curved smile, and rosy cheeks. The eyes are wide open, giving an alert and happy appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended forward and legs close together. The head is upright and the tail is angled outward from the back.
